vBRIEFInfo.author: overdeck/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-2154: Decompose src/lib/workspace-manager.ts (1736 lines) into focused modules

plan.title: Decompose src/lib/workspace-manager.ts (1736 lines) into focused modules
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-8

narratives.Problem: src/lib/workspace-manager.ts is 1736 lines — a god file over the 1000-line file-size ceiling (baselined/grandfathered at '1736 src/lib/workspace-manager.ts' in scripts/file-size-baseline.txt:46). It mixes seven concerns plus the Effect public surface: pre-PAN-967 migration, settings mirroring, git-worktree/port/symlink/template primitives, the large createWorkspace flow, repo-add, Docker cleanup, and workspace removal. 14 src/test files import from it, so the public named-export surface must not change.
narratives.Proposal: Behavior-preserving decomposition following the authoritative PRD draft at .pan/drafts/PAN-2154.md. Create seven cohesive submodules under a NEW sibling directory src/lib/workspace-manager/ (types.ts, migration.ts, worktree-ops.ts, create.ts, repos.ts, docker.ts, remove.ts), each under 1000 lines, layered acyclically (types ← migration/worktree-ops/docker ← create/repos/remove ← barrel). A file src/lib/workspace-manager.ts and a directory src/lib/workspace-manager/ coexist under NodeNext (the .js import resolves to the file/barrel; submodules import as './workspace-manager/<name>.js') — the same pattern routes/workspaces.ts + routes/workspaces/ uses. src/lib/workspace-manager.ts becomes a ~140-line barrel: the devcontainer-renderer import block, the two Effect-error mappers (toWmFsError/toWmProcessError), the 9 Effect-wrapper exports, and re-export statements keeping the public surface byte-identical so all 14 importers + 5 test files resolve unchanged with zero call-site/test edits. One submodule = one bead = one commit; full quality gate after every seam.
narratives.NonGoals:
- No logic changes, signature changes, bug fixes, or behavior changes of any kind — pure moves + re-exports.
- No renamed or removed exports; the barrel's public named-export set is identical before and after.
- No edits to any of the 14 call sites or any test file that imports src/lib/workspace-manager.ts (PRD acceptance #4: git diff --name-only main must list ONLY the barrel, the new src/lib/workspace-manager/*.ts files, eslint-any-allowlist.json, and scripts/file-size-baseline.txt).
- Do NOT add a new export-snapshot test — it would violate PRD acceptance #4; the no-loss audit is typecheck of all 14 importers (a dropped export fails the build) + the existing barrel-importing tests + git-grep of export names + the full vitest suite per seam.
- Do NOT delete createSymlinks (pre-existing dead code at line 518) — move it verbatim into worktree-ops.ts; deletion is a separate future cleanup.
- Do NOT touch the already-separate src/lib/workspace/ modules (devcontainer-renderer, ensure-devcontainer, etc.) beyond importing from them.
- No new explicit `any`; no execSync (preserve async execAsync); no new import cycles.
- No re-export of internal helpers or *Promise functions from the barrel — only the previously-public symbols.

autoDecisions.summary: Adopt the PRD draft's 7-module layout under a NEW directory src/lib/workspace-manager/, not the 5-module src/lib/workspace/ layout my initial exploration sketched.
autoDecisions.rationale: The PRD draft (.pan/drafts/PAN-2154.md) is the authoritative, human-verified spec for this issue. It explicitly chose src/lib/workspace-manager/ (file+dir coexist under NodeNext, citing the routes/workspaces precedent) and scoped touching the existing src/lib/workspace/ modules as out of scope. Honoring the PRD avoids fragmenting the workspace domain and matches the codebase-health campaign convention.

autoDecisions.summary: Do NOT add an export-surface snapshot test as a no-loss gate (unlike PAN-2146's agents.ts decomposition).
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD acceptance #4 constrains the diff to exactly four file categories and forbids new test files. For a pure type/value re-export refactor, TypeScript already fails the build if any of the 14 importers loses a symbol, and the existing tests (tests/lib/workspace-manager.test.ts, src/lib/__tests__/relocate-venv-scripts.test.ts, tests/lib/pan-artifacts.test.ts) import the public surface from the barrel — together with PRD AC#1 (git grep of export names) and the full vitest suite per seam, that is the blocking no-loss audit the additive-refactor rule requires.

autoDecisions.summary: worktree-ops.ts and types.ts are NOT added to eslint-any-allowlist.json; only migration.ts, create.ts, repos.ts, docker.ts, remove.ts are.
autoDecisions.rationale: Verified at SHA b0110a6f6e: the worktree-ops symbol set (lines 309-631 + preTrustDirectorySync 1212-1250) and the types/PRE_WORKTREE_METADATA_DIRS set carry zero explicit `any`. The PRD's NFR-1 list mistakenly included worktree-ops.ts. The A1 rule only requires allowlisting files that actually carry moved `any`; adding a clean file is unnecessary.

autoDecisions.summary: Final bead removes the '1736 src/lib/workspace-manager.ts' line from scripts/file-size-baseline.txt entirely (per PRD NFR-4), and removes the stale src/lib/workspace-manager.ts entry from eslint-any-allowlist.json (line 153, per PRD NFR-1).
autoDecisions.rationale: The shrunk barrel is < 1000 lines so it needs no baseline entry (removing the line prevents silent re-inflation), and after extraction it carries no `any` so its allowlist entry is stale. Both are explicit PRD requirements.

items.title: Extract shared types + PRE_WORKTREE_METADATA_DIRS into workspace-manager/types.ts

narrative.Action: Create the new directory src/lib/workspace-manager/ and a types.ts inside it. Move verbatim all 9 exported interfaces (PanMigrationResult, WorkspaceProgress, WorkspaceCreateOptions, WorkspaceCreateResult, AddReposToWorkspaceOptions, AddReposToWorkspaceResult, WorkspaceRemoveOptions, WorkspaceRemoveResult, DockerCleanupResult) plus the value `const PRE_WORKTREE_METADATA_DIRS = new Set(['.pan', '.beads'])`, exporting each. In src/lib/workspace-manager.ts delete the moved definitions and re-export the interfaces with `export type { PanMigrationResult, WorkspaceProgress, WorkspaceCreateOptions, WorkspaceCreateResult, AddReposToWorkspaceOptions, AddReposToWorkspaceResult, WorkspaceRemoveOptions, WorkspaceRemoveResult, DockerCleanupResult } from './workspace-manager/types.js'`. Do NOT re-export PRE_WORKTREE_METADATA_DIRS (it was private; it stays off the public surface and is imported by worktree-ops.ts in a later bead). This bead establishes the directory + '.js' ESM import extension + 'export type' convention every later seam copies; types.ts carries no `any`, so it is NOT added to eslint-any-allowlist.json. Use ESM relative imports with the .js extension, matching the existing src/lib import style.

items.title: The new file src/lib/workspace-manager/types.ts contains the 9 interfaces verbatim plus the PRE_WORKTREE_METADATA_DIRS const, and is under 1000 lines.

src/lib/workspace-manager.ts re-exports the 9 interfaces via `export type { ... } from './workspace-manager/types.js'` and does NOT re-export PRE_WORKTREE_METADATA_DIRS; `git grep` shows the identical set of exported interface names as before.
types.ts is NOT added to eslint-any-allowlist.json; `npm run typecheck` exits 0 and `npm run lint` exits 0.
`npx vitest run --configLoader runner` passes with 0 failed and no importer or test file is edited.
Extract migration/settings sync fns into workspace-manager/migration.ts

narrative.Action: Move migrateOverdeckToPanSync, copyOverdeckSettingsToWorkspaceSync (with its nested isBrokenHookCommand), and ensurePanGitignoreSync verbatim into src/lib/workspace-manager/migration.ts, exporting all three. Import the PanMigrationResult type from './types.js'. In the barrel, delete the moved definitions, add `import { migrateOverdeckToPanSync, copyOverdeckSettingsToWorkspaceSync, ensurePanGitignoreSync } from './workspace-manager/migration.js'`, re-export those three (`export { ... }`), and keep the migrateOverdeckToPan/copyOverdeckSettingsToWorkspace/ensurePanGitignore Effect wrappers referencing the imported *Sync fns. This module carries explicit `any` (catch blocks @89,145,231) — add 'src/lib/workspace-manager/migration.ts' to eslint-any-allowlist.json in the same commit. Introduce no NEW `any`.

items.title: The new file src/lib/workspace-manager/migration.ts contains migrateOverdeckToPanSync, copyOverdeckSettingsToWorkspaceSync, ensurePanGitignoreSync moved verbatim, imports PanMigrationResult from './types.js', and is under 1000 lines.
The barrel re-exports those three *Sync fns, each of the three migration Effect wrappers resolves against the imported fns, and git grep shows the public export-name set is preserved.
'src/lib/workspace-manager/migration.ts' is added to eslint-any-allowlist.json and `npm run lint` exits 0 with no new explicit `any`.
`npm run typecheck` exits 0 and `npx vitest run --configLoader runner` reports 0 failed (tests/lib/pan-artifacts.test.ts still green); no importer/test edited.
Extract worktree/port/symlink/template primitives into workspace-manager/worktree-ops.ts

narrative.Action: Move verbatim into src/lib/workspace-manager/worktree-ops.ts: validateFeatureName, relocateVenvScripts, createWorktree, removeWorktree, assignPort, releasePort, createSymlinks (DEAD CODE — move as-is, do not delete), the TEXT_EXTENSIONS const, isPreWorktreeMetadataOnlyDir, stagePreWorktreeMetadataSync, mergeDirectoryWithoutOverwriteSync, restorePreWorktreeMetadataSync, copyProjectTemplateDirs (with nested copyDir), and preTrustDirectorySync. Export every symbol other modules/the barrel need (all of the above functions). Import PRE_WORKTREE_METADATA_DIRS from './types.js'. In the barrel, delete the moved definitions and re-export ONLY the previously-public ones: `export { relocateVenvScripts, preTrustDirectorySync } from './workspace-manager/worktree-ops.js'`; the preTrustDirectory Effect wrapper references the imported preTrustDirectorySync. This module carries NO explicit `any` — do NOT add it to eslint-any-allowlist.json. No new import cycle (worktree-ops imports only from ./types.js).

items.title: src/lib/workspace-manager/worktree-ops.ts exists, under 1000 lines, containing the listed 13 functions + TEXT_EXTENSIONS moved verbatim (createSymlinks included, unmodified), importing PRE_WORKTREE_METADATA_DIRS from './types.js'.

The barrel re-exports relocateVenvScripts and preTrustDirectorySync from './workspace-manager/worktree-ops.js'; the preTrustDirectory Effect wrapper resolves; the public export-name set is unchanged (git grep).
worktree-ops.ts is NOT added to eslint-any-allowlist.json; `npm run lint` exits 0 with no new explicit `any`.
`npm run typecheck` exits 0 and `npx vitest run --configLoader runner` reports 0 failed (src/lib/__tests__/relocate-venv-scripts.test.ts still green); no importer/test edited.
Extract createWorkspacePromise into workspace-manager/create.ts

narrative.Action: Move createWorkspacePromise (~580 lines) verbatim into src/lib/workspace-manager/create.ts, exporting it. Add the imports it needs: the create types from './types.js'; from './migration.js' nothing unless used; from './worktree-ops.js' the primitives it calls (validateFeatureName, createWorktree, assignPort, relocateVenvScripts, copyProjectTemplateDirs, stagePreWorktreeMetadataSync, restorePreWorktreeMetadataSync, preTrustDirectorySync); and the devcontainer-renderer import block from '../workspace/devcontainer-renderer.js' (createWorkspacePlaceholdersSync as createPlaceholders, sanitizeComposeFileSync, renderDevcontainerSync, DEVCONTAINER_DIRNAME, processTemplatesSync). In the barrel, delete the moved definition, `import { createWorkspacePromise } from './workspace-manager/create.js'`, and keep the createWorkspace Effect wrapper referencing it. createWorkspacePromise is NOT re-exported from the barrel. This module carries explicit `any` (@712,811,856,872,947,985,1050,1100) — add 'src/lib/workspace-manager/create.ts' to eslint-any-allowlist.json. No NEW `any`; preserve async execAsync, add no execSync.

Confirm thin barrel, drop file-size baseline line, and remove stale allowlist entry

narrative.Action: After all extractions, confirm src/lib/workspace-manager.ts contains only: its imports (including the devcontainer-renderer block and the *Sync/*Promise imports from ./workspace-manager/*.js), the two Effect-error mappers (toWmFsError, toWmProcessError), the 9 Effect-wrapper exports, and the re-export statements for the public types + *Sync fns — no migrate/copy/create/repos/docker/remove function bodies remain. Remove the '1736 src/lib/workspace-manager.ts' line from scripts/file-size-baseline.txt entirely (the barrel is now < 1000 and needs no baseline entry, per NFR-4). Remove the stale 'src/lib/workspace-manager.ts' entry (line 153) from eslint-any-allowlist.json since the barrel no longer carries `any` (per NFR-1). Run the final full gate.

items.title: src/lib/workspace-manager.ts is materially smaller (~140 lines) and contains only imports, the two Effect-error mappers, the 9 Effect-wrapper exports, and `export`/`export type` re-export statements — no migrate/copy/create/repos/docker/remove function bodies.

The '1736 src/lib/workspace-manager.ts' line is removed from scripts/file-size-baseline.txt, every src/lib/workspace-manager/*.ts file is under 1000 lines, and `bash scripts/lint-file-size.sh` passes.
The 'src/lib/workspace-manager.ts' entry is removed from eslint-any-allowlist.json and `npm run lint` exits 0 (no unused-allowlist or new-any error).

`git diff --name-only main` lists ONLY src/lib/workspace-manager.ts, the new src/lib/workspace-manager/*.ts files, eslint-any-allowlist.json, and scripts/file-size-baseline.txt; `npm run typecheck` exits 0 and `npx vitest run --configLoader runner` reports 0 failed.
